content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 TELUS Digital: Content Reviewer - US Anywhere in the World Nevada Search Engine Optimization (SEO), AI Research, and Social Media Content All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/2702/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Las Vegas, Nevada <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://jobs.telusdigital.com/search/jobs?cfm5=Artificial+Intelligence&amp;ns_category=artificial-intelligence">https://jobs.telusdigital.com/search/jobs?cfm5=Artificial+Intelligence&amp;ns_category=artificial-intelligence</a> </p> <div class="figma-padding-bottom-32 tw-border-b tw-border-[#E3E6E8]"> <p>Looking for a freelance opportunity where you can make an impact on technology from the comfort of your home? If you are dynamic, tech-savvy, and always online to learn more, this part-time flexible project is the perfect fit for you!&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>A Day in the Life of a Content Reviewer - US:</strong></p> <ul> <li>In this role, you’ll be analyzing and providing feedback on texts, pages, images, and other types of information for top search engines, using an online tool</li> <li>Through reviewing and rating search results for relevance and quality, you’ll be helping to improve the overall user experience for millions of search engine users, including yourself.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Join our team today and start putting your skills to work for one of the world's leading search engines.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>The estimated hourly earnings for this role are&nbsp;14 USD per hour.&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Please note only one member per household can work on this program. If at a later stage it is identified that more than one person in your household is working on the TELUS Digital Rating Program, it will result in removal from the program.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>TELUS Digital AI Community</strong></p> <p>Our global AI Community is a vibrant network of 1 million+ contributors from diverse backgrounds who help our customers collect, enhance, train, translate, and localize content to build better AI models. Become part of our growing community and make an impact supporting the machine learning models of some of the world’s largest brands.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div class="pt-7 figma-padding-bottom-32 tw-border-b tw-border-[#E3E6E8]"> <h4 class="sui-font-heading sui-text-h2 tw-font-bold sui-text-darkGray-darker tw-mb-1">Qualification path</h4> <p class="sui-text-b3 sui-text-darkGray-darker ql-editor">&nbsp;</p> <p>No previous professional experience is required to apply to this role, however, working on this project will require you to pass the basic requirements and go through a standard assessment process. This is a part-time long-term project and your work will be subject to our standard quality assurance checks during the term of this agreement.&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Basic Requirements</strong></p> <ul> <li>Working as a freelancer with excellent communication skills in English</li> <li>Being a resident in the United States for the last 3 consecutive years and having familiarity with current and historical business, media, sport, news, social media, and cultural affairs in the US.</li> <li>Active use of Gmail and other forms of social media and experience in the use of web browsers to navigate and interact with a variety of content</li> <li>Daily access to a broadband internet connection, a smartphone (Android 5.0, iOS 14 or higher), and a personal computer to work on.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Assessment</strong></p> <p>In order to be hired into the program, you’ll take a language assessment and an&nbsp;open book qualification exam that will determine your suitability for the position and complete ID verification. Don’t worry, our team will provide you with guidelines and learning materials before your exam. You will be required to complete the exam in a specific timeframe but at your convenience!</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Equal Opportunity</strong></p> <p>All qualified applicants will receive consideration for a contractual relationship without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or protected veteran status. At TELUS Digital AI, we are proud to offer equal opportunities and are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive community. All aspects of selection are based on applicants’ qualifications, merits, competence, and performance without regard to any characteristic related to diversity.</p> </div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/telus-digital-content-reviewer-us-4">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/telus-digital-content-reviewer-us-4</a></p> Fri, 15 May 2026
